//: VSA enforcement rules. Requires eslint to be installed in backend (npm i -D eslint).

no-restricted-syntax.message: VSA: process.env.* is forbidden outside backend/config/env.js. Import the validated config instead.

patterns.message: VSA: a feature must not import from another feature. Move shared code to backend/shared/.
VSA: do not import supabase-js directly. Use backend/shared/lib/supabaseClient.js.

overrides.//: config/env.js is the only place allowed to read process.env
Only the shared supabase client may import @supabase/supabase-js
pages/api handlers are thin — no business logic, no DB queries

patterns.message: VSA: handlers must not query the DB directly. Call a feature service which calls a repository.
